name: Grand Theft Auto V Enhanced
description: Explore Los Santos in the classic Legacy Edition or the upgraded Enhanced Edition.

name: SpaceEngine
description: The world's first science-based photorealistic interactive 3D planetarium that models the entire Universe, using procedural generation for uncharted areas.

name: TEKKEN 8
description: TEKKEN 8 is the latest addition to the TEKKEN series, the pinnacle of 3D fighting games. Join the fight with over 32 characters and bear witness to the next installment in this epic saga. Get ready for the biggest and best TEKKEN game ever made!

name: No Man's Sky
description: No Man's Sky is a game about exploration and survival in an infinite procedurally generated universe.

name: Truck Driver: The American Dream
description: Chase the American Dream and build your career as a truck driver! Get your life back on track by taking on jobs, unlocking new trucks, buying new parts, and navigating the open road as you learn what it takes to become a successful truck driver!

name: Escape From Crimson Manor: Trapped Together
description: Work together to escape the manor in "Trapped Together", a narrative co-op puzzle campaign where logic reigns and death is not an option. Communicate, trade items via dumbwaiter, and solve intricate riddles.

name: Crimson Desert
description: Crimson Desert is an open-world action-adventure set on the continent of Pywel. Join Kliff on his journey to rebuild the Greymane faction and to save the land from a looming threat. From vast wilderness and cities to ruins and the mysterious Abyss, forge your path through battles and discovery.

name: Windrose
description: Embark on a PvE survival adventure in the Age of Piracy. Fight on land and sea, solo or with friends. Build, craft and explore vast open world filled with dark secrets. Master soulslite combat and take on challenging bosses, command your ship and plunder unspoken treasures!

name: NBA 2K26
description: Bragging rights are on the line in MyCAREER, MyTEAM, MyNBA, The W, and Play Now. Showcase your bag of moves with hyper realism, Powered by ProPLAY™, and challenge your friends, or rivals, in NBA 2K26’s competitive modes—and leave no doubt that you wear the crown.

name: Black Desert
description: Played by over 20 million Adventurers - Black Desert Online is an open-world, action MMORPG. Experience intense, action-packed combat, battle massive world bosses, fight alongside friends to siege and conquer castles, and train in professions such as fishing, trading, crafting, cooking, and more!

name: PRAGMATA
description: Here comes Capcom’s newest challenger! Street Fighter™ 6 launches worldwide on June 2nd, 2023 and represents the next evolution of the Street Fighter™ series! Street Fighter 6 spans three distinct game modes, including World Tour, Fighting Ground and Battle Hub.

name: Stellaris
description: Explore a galaxy full of wonders in this sci-fi grand strategy game from Paradox Development Studios. Interact with diverse alien races, discover strange new worlds with unexpected events and expand the reach of your empire. Each new adventure holds almost limitless possibilities.

name: Bully: Scholarship Edition
description: Bully tells the story of mischievous 15-year-old Jimmy Hopkins as he goes through the hilarity and awkwardness of adolescence. Beat the jocks at dodge ball, play pranks on the preppies, save the nerds, kiss the girl and navigate the social hierarchy in the worst school around.

name: Freedom Fighters
description: Freedom Fighters is an intense third-person action game set in an alternate history New York during the invasion of a foreign superpower. Take on the role of Chris Stone, a hard-working plumber, and rise through the ranks of the resistance to prove yourself as a charismatic leader.

name: Max Payne 2: The Fall of Max Payne
description: Max Payne 2: The Fall of Max Payne is a violent, film-noir love story. Dark, tragic and intense, the in-depth story is a thrill-ride of shocking twists and revelations. Love hurts.

name: Car Mechanic Simulator 2021
description: Work your way to a service empire. Get your hands dirty in a highly realistic simulation game that pays major attention to details. Pay a visit to a new Auction house and buy cars in various conditions. Expand your range of services by investing in a new work space and equipment.

name: Totally Accurate Battle Simulator
description: Be the leader of wobblers from ancient lands, spooky places, and fantasy worlds. Watch them fight in simulations made with the wobbliest physics system ever created, make your own wobblers in the unit creator and send your army off to fight your friends in multiplayer.

name: Stray
description: Lost, alone and separated from family, a stray cat must untangle an ancient mystery to escape a long-forgotten cybercity and find their way home.

name: Backrooms: Escape Together
description: A visually lifelike co-op horror game for 1-6 people. Journey through 11 procedurally generated levels, using what's available to survive and progress deeper into the Backrooms.

name: Cities: Skylines
description: Cities: Skylines is a modern take on the classic city simulation. The game introduces new game play elements to realize the thrill and hardships of creating and maintaining a real city whilst expanding on some well-established tropes of the city building experience.

name: Cities: Skylines II
description: Raise a city from the ground up and transform it into a thriving metropolis with the most realistic city builder ever. Push your creativity and problem-solving to build on a scale you've never experienced. With deep simulation and a living economy, this is world-building without limits.

name: Starvester
description: A short incremental game about expanding a star-system wide factory to build giant megastructures in space. Deploy swarms of drones, mine resources, unlock upgrades and harvest the power of the stars!

name: Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024
description: Explore the world with our largest fleet of aircraft and take simulation to new heights while pursuing your aviation career within Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024.

name: Hearts of Iron IV
description: Victory is at your fingertips! Your ability to lead your nation is your supreme weapon, the strategy game Hearts of Iron IV lets you take command of any nation in World War II; the most engaging conflict in world history.

name: American Truck Simulator
description: Experience legendary American trucks and deliver various cargoes across sunny California, sandy Nevada, and the Grand Canyon State of Arizona. American Truck Simulator takes you on a journey through the breathtaking landscapes and widely recognized landmarks around the States.

name: Starminer
description: Design and build a massive interstellar fleet in this simulation sandbox. Strip space of its minerals for profit, but stay alert: your greed attracts the alien. Master deep base-building and deploy warships to protect your empire in immersive real-time space.

name: MOUSE: P.I. For Hire
description: Join private investigator Jack Pepper on a guns blazing, jazz-fueled adventure in MOUSE: P.I. For Hire. MOUSE combines the charm of hand-drawn rubber hose animation inspired by the classic cartoons of the 1930’s with the adrenaline and action of an explosive first person shooter.

name: Arma Reforger
description: Engage in massive combined arms battles, create and curate combat missions in real time, and shape your experience with endless community mods. Deploy into the Cold War and experience the most authentic and immersive military sandbox ever created.

name: Fallout 76
description: Bethesda Game Studios welcome you to Fallout 76. Twenty-five years after the bombs fall, you and your fellow Vault Dwellers emerge into post-nuclear America. Explore a vast wasteland in this open-world multiplayer addition to the Fallout story.

name: Tom Clancy’s The Division® 2
description: Join The Division in this open world tactical shooter. Engage in intense cover-based combat, team up with friends, and build your ultimate agent to save Washington, D.C.

name: Planet Zoo
description: Build a world for wildlife in Planet Zoo. From the developers of Planet Coaster and Zoo Tycoon comes the ultimate zoo sim. Construct detailed habitats, manage your zoo, and meet authentic living animals who think, feel and explore the world you create around them.

name: Clair Obscur: Expedition 33
description: Lead the members of Expedition 33 on their quest to destroy the Paintress so that she can never paint death again. Explore a world of wonders inspired by Belle Époque France and battle unique enemies in this turn-based RPG with real-time mechanics.

name: Satisfactory
description: Satisfactory is a first-person open-world factory building game with a dash of exploration and combat. Play alone or with friends, explore an alien planet, create multi-story factories, and enter conveyor belt heaven!

name: Dispatch
description: Dispatch is a superhero workplace comedy where choices matter. Manage a dysfunctional team of misfit heroes and strategize who to send to emergencies around the city, all while balancing office politics, personal relationships, and your own quest to become a hero. All episodes out now!

name: ICARUS
description: ICARUS is a solo or multiplayer PvE survival game. Explore a savage wilderness in the aftermath of terraforming gone wrong. Complete narrative quests as either Open World operations or Individual Missions. Explore, build, craft and hunt while seeking your fortune and prospecting for exotic matter.

name: Metro Exodus
description: Flee the shattered ruins of the Moscow Metro and embark on an epic, continent-spanning journey across the post-apocalyptic Russian wilderness. Explore vast, non-linear levels, lose yourself in an immersive, sandbox survival experience, and follow a thrilling story-line that spans an entire year in the greatest Metro adventure yet.

name: Among Us
description: An online and local party game of teamwork and betrayal for 4-15 players...in space!

name: Poppy Playtime
description: You must stay alive in this horror/puzzle adventure. Try to survive the vengeful toys waiting for you in the abandoned toy factory. Use your GrabPack to hack electrical circuits or nab anything from afar. Explore the mysterious facility... and don't get caught.

name: Hollow Knight
description: Forge your own path in Hollow Knight! An epic action adventure through a vast ruined kingdom of insects and heroes. Explore twisting caverns, battle tainted creatures and befriend bizarre bugs, all in a classic, hand-drawn 2D style.

name: Hollow Knight: Silksong
description: Discover a vast, haunted kingdom in Hollow Knight: Silksong! Explore, fight and survive as you ascend to the peak of a land ruled by silk and song.

name: Planet Zoo 2
description: Build a wilder world in Planet Zoo 2. Create distinctive zoos around the globe filled with awe-inspiring animals, including fully aquatic and flying species, before taking your experience beyond the zoo to release your animals into expansive Wildlife Reserves.

name: WWE 2K26
description: The show never stops in WWE 2K26! Step into CM Punk’s 2K Showcase, dominate with 400+ Superstars and Legends, and unleash chaos with all-new match types.

name: Pummel Party
description: Pummel Party is a 4-8 player online and local-multiplayer party game. Pummel friends or AI using a wide array of absurd items in the board mode and compete to destroy friendships in the unique collection of minigames.

name: Metro: Last Light Redux
description: It is the year 2034. Beneath the ruins of post-apocalyptic Moscow, in the tunnels of the Metro, the remnants of mankind are besieged by deadly threats from outside – and within. Mutants stalk the catacombs beneath the desolate surface, and hunt amidst the poisoned skies above.

name: Middle-earth™: Shadow of Mordor™
description: Fight through Mordor and uncover the truth of the spirit that compels you, discover the origins of the Rings of Power, build your legend and ultimately confront the evil of Sauron in this new chronicle of Middle-earth.

name: Middle-earth™: Shadow of War™
description: Experience an epic open-world brought to life by the award-winning Nemesis System. Forge a new Ring of Power, conquer Fortresses in massive battles and dominate Mordor with your personal orc army in Middle-earth™: Shadow of War™.

name: The Forest
description: As the lone survivor of a passenger jet crash, you find yourself in a mysterious forest battling to stay alive against a society of cannibalistic mutants. Build, explore, survive in this terrifying first person survival horror simulator.

name: Sekiro™: Shadows Die Twice - GOTY Edition
description: Game of the Year - The Game Awards 2019 Best Action Game of 2019 - IGN Carve your own clever path to vengeance in the award winning adventure from developer FromSoftware, creators of Bloodborne and the Dark Souls series. Take Revenge. Restore Your Honor. Kill Ingeniously.

name: MECCHA CHAMELEON
description: Paint yourself to blend in! "Meccha Chameleon" is a new-sensation hide-and-seek game where you paint your white body to mimic the stage. Spot, pose, and "artistic skill" are keys to survival. Deceive Seekers with techniques that put chameleons to shame! Supports public matches and streaming.

name: Pratfall
description: A co-op game for 1-6+ players where you fall, dig, and explode your way down a dangerous cave system to find your lost dog. Catch your friends and watch your step on this journey full of traps, hazards, and the most deadly force of all: gravity. Will you jump into the unknown to rescue your dog?

name: Gamble With Your Friends
description: An online 1-6 player co-op "casino crawler" where you and your friends share one bank account and one massive debt. Gamble, buy sketchy items, make terrible decisions, and climb an ominous casino tower to hit your loan shark’s daily quota in 5 minutes - or face the consequences.

name: Fable
description: Become the Hero you want to be in an immersive open-world action-RPG where each choice shapes your journey, reputation is everything, and fairytale endings are never guaranteed.

name: Silent Still
description: Silent Still is a first-person psychological horror game that delves into the terrifying experience of sleep paralysis and nightmares. You will feel the true horror that sleep paralysis can bring and the overwhelming fear it instills in a person.

name: İblis3:Phenomena
description: İBLİS 3: PHENOMENA is a first-person psychological horror game. Explore a mysterious house set in realistic, slow-paced, atmospheric, and disturbing environments. It contains no puzzle or exploration elements; it is entirely built on tension and psychological pressure.

name: Resident Evil 2
description: A deadly virus engulfs the residents of Raccoon City in September of 1998, plunging the city into chaos as flesh eating zombies roam the streets for survivors. An unparalleled adrenaline rush, gripping storyline, and unimaginable horrors await you. Witness the return of Resident Evil 2.

name: REMATCH
description: Rematch is an online multiplayer football game. Control one player and compete with your team in fast-paced 5v5 matches from an immersive third-person perspective. Team up with your friends and join the action.

name: Assassin’s Creed® IV Black Flag™
description: Discover Assassin's Creed IV Black Flag, the classic pirate action-adventure game from 2013. Command your ship, hunt Templars and carve your legend as Edward Kenway across the Caribbean's Golden Age of Piracy.

name: The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt
description: You are Geralt of Rivia, mercenary monster slayer. Before you stands a war-torn, monster-infested continent you can explore at will. Your current contract? Tracking down Ciri — the Child of Prophecy, a living weapon that can alter the shape of the world.

name: The Crew™ 2
description: Take on the American motorsports scene as you explore and dominate the land, air, and sea across the entire USA. New: play The Crew 2 offline or online with the new Hybrid mode, available now!

name: Red Dead Online
description: Step into the vibrant, ever-evolving world of Red Dead Online and experience life in frontier America. Chase down bounties, battle outlaw gangs and other players, hunt, fish and trade, search for exotic treasures, run Moonshine, and much more to discover in a world of astounding depth and detail.

name: Watch_Dogs® 2
description: Welcome to San Francisco. Play as Marcus, a brilliant young hacker, and join the most notorious hacker group, DedSec. Your objective: execute the biggest hack of history.

name: Watch_Dogs™
description: In today's hyper-connected world, Chicago operates under ctOS, the most advanced computer network in America.

name: Watch Dogs®: Legion
description: Build a resistance as you fight to take back a near-future London facing its downfall. Welcome to the Resistance.

name: Chivalry 2
description: Chivalry 2 is a multiplayer first person slasher inspired by epic medieval movie battles. Players are thrust into the action of every iconic moment of the era - from clashing swords, to storms of flaming arrows, to sprawling castle sieges and more.

name: F1® 25
description: Rewrite The Grid with the ultimate evolution in racing: EA SPORTS™ F1® 25: 2026 Season Edition. Get F1® 25 and the 2026 Season Pack in one bundle for the most complete Formula One® experience.

name: Motor Town: Behind The Wheel
description: Enjoy realistic driving in the open world. Relaxing cargo deliveries or driving buses and taxis will give you enough money to buy new cars and parts. You can test your driving skills at the race track. It's all about pure driving pleasure!

name: RoadCraft
description: As the leader of a company specialized in restoring sites devastated by natural disasters, use your construction machinery to restart the local industry. Clear debris and faulty equipment, rebuild roads and bridges damaged by weather, and much more!

name: The Last of Us™ Part I
description: Discover the award-winning game that inspired the critically acclaimed television show. Guide Joel and Ellie through a post-apocalyptic America, and encounter unforgettable allies and enemies in The Last of Us™.

name: The Last of Us™ Part II Remastered
description: Experience the winner of over 300 Game of the Year awards, now on PC. Discover Ellie and Abby’s story with graphical enhancements, gameplay modes like the roguelike survival experience No Return, and more.

name: The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim Special Edition
description: Winner of more than 200 Game of the Year Awards, The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim Special Edition brings the epic fantasy to life in stunning detail. The Special Edition includes the critically acclaimed game and add-ons with all-new features.

name: Assetto Corsa
description: A true racing simulator with realistic physics, laser-scanned tracks, and authentic cars.

name: Red Dead Redemption 2
description: Live the Wild West in Story Mode or Red Dead Online with endless freedom and adventure.

name: Euro Truck Simulator 2
description: Drive across Europe, build your trucking empire, and enjoy a relaxing driving journey.

name: Tom Clancy's Rainbow Six® Siege X
description: A tactical shooter where teamwork, strategy, and operator skills decide every battle.

name: Assetto Corsa Ultimate Edition BUNDLE (?)
description: The complete racing experience with all cars, tracks, and DLCs in one ultimate package.

name: FOR HONOR™
description: Choose knights, samurai, or vikings and fight intense melee battles to prove your skill.

name: Lethal Company
description: A co-op horror game — explore, collect scrap, and survive terrifying monsters together.

name: Palworld
description: Catch creatures, build bases, and survive in a vast open world filled with battles.

name: Rust
description: The ultimate survival game. Gather resources, build bases, and fight to stay alive against players and the environment.

name: Sleeping Dogs: Definitive Edition
description: An open-world action game set in Hong Kong. Play as an undercover cop in a gritty story of crime, loyalty, and martial arts combat.

name: Garry's Mod
description: A sandbox game with limitless creativity. Build, experiment, and play with physics — or dive into endless community-made modes.

name: Wallpaper Engine
description: Bring your desktop to life with animated, interactive, and customizable wallpapers.

name: Detroit: Become Human
description: A narrative-driven adventure where your choices shape the story. Discover a future where androids struggle for freedom.

name: Arma 3
description: A realistic military sandbox with large-scale combat, authentic weapons, and endless community-made scenarios.

name: Ready or Not
description: A tactical FPS focused on realistic SWAT operations. Plan carefully, breach, and neutralize threats in high-stakes missions.

name: Far Cry® 6
description: Fight for freedom in a tropical paradise torn apart by revolution, with explosive action and open-world chaos.

name: Ghost of Tsushima DIRECTOR'S CUT
description: Become a samurai warrior on a journey to protect Tsushima, with breathtaking landscapes and expanded story content.

name: CarX Drift Racing Online
description: Master the art of drifting with realistic physics, customizable cars, and intense online competitions.

name: 007 First Light
description: Earn the Number. 007 First Light is a thrilling espionage action-adventure game from IO Interactive. Follow James Bond as a young, resourceful and sometimes reckless recruit in MI6's training programme, and discover an origin story of the world’s most famous spy.

name: Gang Beasts
description: A hilarious multiplayer brawler with goofy physics, wobbly characters, and chaotic street fights.

name: Human Fall Flat
description: Solve puzzles with quirky physics and explore imaginative worlds — solo or with friends.

name: Manor Lords
description: A medieval strategy game that blends city-building, resource management, and large-scale battles.

name: Battlefield™ 2042
description: Engage in all-out warfare with massive maps, futuristic weapons, and large-scale multiplayer battles.

name: Mount & Blade II: Bannerlord
description: Build your kingdom, command armies, and fight in epic medieval battles in this sandbox RPG.

name: Overcooked! 2
description: Team up with friends in frantic kitchen chaos — cook, serve, and save the world from hunger.

name: Phasmophobia
description: A chilling co-op ghost-hunting experience — gather evidence, face hauntings, and survive the unknown.

name: ELDEN RING
description: A vast fantasy action RPG created by FromSoftware. Explore, battle, and uncover the mysteries of the Lands Between.

name: Baldur's Gate 3
description: A cinematic RPG adventure based on D&D, where your choices shape the story and world around you.

name: Dying Light 2 Stay Human: Reloaded Edition
description: Survive a post-apocalyptic city filled with zombies, parkour freedom, and branching storylines.

name: Dead by Daylight
description: A multiplayer horror game where one killer hunts four survivors in tense, unpredictable matches.

name: Bodycam
description: An ultra-realistic tactical FPS with immersive body camera gameplay and intense firefights.

name: Assassin's Creed Valhalla
description: Live the saga of a Viking raider — raid, build, and conquer in an epic open world.

name: Cyberpunk 2077
description: Step into Night City, a vast futuristic metropolis, in this open-world RPG full of choices and action.

name: Sea of Thieves: 2025 Edition
description: Set sail in a shared pirate adventure — explore, plunder, and battle on the high seas.

name: 7 Days to Die
description: A survival horror crafting game — scavenge, build, and defend against waves of zombies.

name: Forza Horizon 5
description: Race across Mexico in stunning open-world environments with hundreds of cars and endless freedom.

name: Raft
description: Survive at sea — build your floating base, scavenge debris, and face ocean dangers.

name: Project Zomboid
description: The ultimate zombie survival sandbox — craft, scavenge, and see how long you can last.

name: Terraria
description: Dig, build, fight, and explore in a 2D sandbox full of adventure and creativity.

name: Squad
description: A tactical military shooter that emphasizes teamwork, large-scale battles, and realistic combat.

name: Grand Theft Auto IV: The Complete Edition
description: Experience Niko Bellic’s journey through Liberty City with the full base game and all expansions.

name: DayZ
description: A hardcore survival game in a post-apocalyptic world — fight hunger, disease, and other players.

name: Chained Together
description: Work with friends while chained together — climb, coordinate, and survive hilarious challenges.

name: BeamNG.drive
description: A soft-body physics driving simulator with realistic crashes and limitless vehicle experiments.

name: The Long Drive
description: A road trip survival game across endless deserts with freedom, exploration, and absurd fun.

name: It Takes Two
description: A co-op adventure where two players must work together in creative, story-driven challenges.

name: Battlefield™ 1
description: Step into World War I with large-scale battles, authentic weapons, and immersive chaos.

name: Battlefield 4™
description: Modern military combat with dynamic destruction, massive maps, and intense multiplayer action.

name: Liar's Bar
description: A social deduction party game of bluffing, secrets, and survival in a shady tavern.

name: ARK: Survival Evolved
description: Survive a prehistoric world full of dinosaurs — tame, build, and fight for survival.

name: The Crew Motorfest
description: Race through Hawaii in an open-world festival of cars, challenges, and endless freedom.

name: Outlast
description: A terrifying first-person horror experience inside an abandoned psychiatric hospital.

name: Outlast 2
description: Face psychological horror in a rural nightmare where survival means uncovering dark secrets.

name: Battlefield™ V
description: Fight through World War II with large-scale multiplayer battles and cinematic war stories.

name: EA SPORTS FC™ 25
description: The latest evolution of football gaming, with updated rosters, modes, and realism.

name: Plants vs. Zombies GOTY Edition
description: Defend your garden in the classic tower defense game packed with fun strategy.

name: Plants vs. Zombies™ Garden Warfare 2: Deluxe Edition
description: Team-based multiplayer chaos with plants and zombies in over-the-top battles.

name: Assassin's Creed® Unity
description: Parkour through revolutionary Paris and uncover conspiracies as a skilled Assassin.

name: Assassin's Creed Mirage
description: Return to the series’ roots in Baghdad with stealth-focused gameplay and rich storytelling.

name: DOOM
description: Rip and tear through hordes of demons in fast-paced, brutal first-person combat.

name: A Way Out
description: A cinematic co-op adventure where two players must escape prison and survive together.

name: Assassin's Creed® Origins
description: Journey to Ancient Egypt and uncover the origins of the Assassin Brotherhood.

name: DARK SOULS™ III
description: A dark, challenging action RPG filled with deadly foes and epic boss battles.

name: Resident Evil 4
description: A survival horror masterpiece — rescue the president’s daughter while battling terrifying creatures.

name: Diablo® IV
description: Fight demons, loot powerful gear, and explore a dark, open-world RPG with endless replayability.

name: DARK SOULS™: REMASTERED
description: The legendary action RPG remastered with enhanced visuals and smoother performance.

name: Marvel’s Spider-Man Remastered
description: Swing through New York as Spider-Man in a thrilling, story-driven open-world adventure.

name: Marvel’s Spider-Man: Miles Morales
description: Step into Miles’ shoes with new powers and an emotional superhero journey.

name: Marvel's Spider-Man 2
description: Play as both Peter and Miles in an expanded open-world superhero epic.

name: Tom Clancy's Ghost Recon® Wildlands
description: Lead a special ops team against a cartel in a massive open-world Bolivia.

name: Tom Clancy's Ghost Recon® Breakpoint
description: Survive behind enemy lines in a tactical shooter with solo or co-op gameplay.

name: God of War
description: Join Kratos and Atreus in a mythological journey across Norse realms.

name: God of War Ragnarök
description: An epic conclusion to Kratos’ Norse saga with breathtaking combat and storytelling.

name: Need for Speed™ Unbound
description: Race in a stylish, open-world street racing experience with bold visuals and custom cars.

name: Call of Duty®: Black Ops 6
description: Fast-paced, cinematic FPS action with an all-new campaign, multiplayer, and zombies mode.

name: Monster Hunter Wilds
description: Hunt colossal creatures in a vast new world with dynamic ecosystems.

name: ARK: Survival Ascended
description: A next-gen remake of ARK with upgraded visuals, gameplay, and survival features.

name: The Outlast Trials
description: A co-op horror survival set in disturbing experiments where trust means survival.

name: LEGO® City Undercover
description: Play as an undercover cop in a LEGO open-world full of humor and adventure.

name: R.E.P.O.
description: A creepy indie horror game where you collect, escape, and survive against unknown threats.

name: Hogwarts Legacy
description: Live your wizarding adventure in the Harry Potter universe with magic, exploration, and discovery.

name: Split Fiction
description: A narrative-driven indie adventure blending story, puzzles, and atmospheric mystery.

name: Mortal Kombat 1
description: The legendary fighting game reborn with brutal fatalities and cinematic story.

name: Schedule I
description: A dark, experimental indie game with psychological storytelling and unique mechanics.

name: Mortal Kombat 11
description: Intense fighting with cinematic story, deep combat, and iconic characters.

name: SnowRunner
description: Drive powerful vehicles through extreme terrain in a realistic off-road simulation.

name: EA SPORTS FC™ 26
description: Next-generation football with updated teams, modes, and gameplay improvements.

name: Forza Horizon 6
description: Discover the breathtaking landscapes of Japan in over 550 real-world cars and become a racing Legend in Forza Horizon's biggest open world driving adventure yet

name: WWE 2K25
description: Step into the ring with authentic wrestling action, updated rosters, and new features.

name: Need for Speed™ Heat
description: Race by day, risk it all by night in an open-world street racing challenge.

name: Subnautica
description: Explore the depths of an alien ocean filled with beauty, mystery, and danger.

name: Subnautica: Below Zero
description: A standalone underwater survival adventure in a frozen alien world.

name: Stardew Valley
description: Build your dream farm, grow crops, raise animals, and live a cozy village life.

name: Age of Empires IV: Anniversary Edition
description: Command civilizations through history in one of the most iconic RTS games ever.

name: Grounded 2
description: A survival adventure where you’re shrunken to insect size in a backyard full of dangers.

name: HELLDIVERS™ 2
description: No Man's Sky is a game about exploration and survival in an infinite procedurally generated universe.

name: Stronghold Crusader: Definitive Edition
description: Gird your loins and sharpen your steel! Besiege 20 unique enemy lords and battle friends online.

name: SILENT HILL f
description: Hinako's hometown is engulfed in fog, driving her to fight grotesque monsters and solve eerie puzzles. Uncover the disturbing beauty hidden in terror.

name: SCUM
description: Traverse punishing environments, looting, crafting and evading the constant threats to your life.

name: Dying Light: The Beast
description: You are Kyle Crane, and after years of brutal experiments, you want revenge. Experience a unique blend of open world and survival horror as you hunt down the man who transformed you into half man, half beast.

name: Battlefield™ 6
description: The ultimate all-out warfare experience. In a war of tanks, fighter jets, and massive combat arsenals, your squad is the deadliest weapon.

name: Pacify
description: An online co-op horror game where you pacify, weaken and capture supernatural creatures for PAH Inc. Each level has a different story, unique monsters, and multiple endings. Play single player or together with up to 6 friends. Includes proximity voice chat with fun effects.

name: PEAK
description: PEAK is a co-op climbing game where the slightest mistake can spell your doom. Either solo or as a group of lost nature scouts, your only hope of rescue from a mysterious island is to scale the mountain at its center. Do you have what it takes to reach the PEAK?

name: Bread & Fred
description: Grab your best bud for help in this new co-op challenge to help two adorable penguins, Bread and Fred, reach the top of the snowy summit. Time your jumps, cling to walls and swing across gaps to see how far you can make it before you tumble all the way back down the mountain.

name: Super Bunny Man
description: A physics-based co-op platformer about a guy in a rabbit costume! Team up with a friend or three (local or online) to beat levels, find hidden carrots and race against the clock. Experience bunny madness. Embrace carrot chaos. Become Super Bunny Man.

name: ARC Raiders
description: ARC Raiders is a multiplayer extraction adventure, set in a lethal future earth, ravaged by a mysterious mechanized threat known as ARC.

name: Party Animals
description: Fight your friends as puppies, kittens and other fuzzy creatures in PARTY ANIMALS! Paw it out with your friends remotely, or huddle together for chaotic fun on the same screen. Interact with the world under our realistic physics engine. Did I mention PUPPIES?

name: Call of Duty®: Black Ops 7
description: In Call of Duty®: Black Ops 7, Treyarch and Raven Software are bringing players the biggest Black Ops ever across an innovative Co-Op Campaign, an electrifying Multiplayer experience, and the legendary Round-Based Zombies mode.

name: Solo Leveling: ARISE OVERDRIVE
description: Solo Leveling, the webtoon with 14.3 billion views worldwide, is now an action RPG game! Help our hero grow from his humble E-Rank beginnings.

name: Resident Evil Requiem
description: Requiem for the dead. Nightmare for the living. Prepare to escape death in a heart-stopping experience that will chill you to your core.
